text: Phone call transcript: This is Inspector Sharma from CBI Cyber Cell. Your Aadhaar is linked to money laundering case CR-4521. Stay on this video call and do not inform anyone.
Phone call transcript: Your bank account is blocked due to KYC failure. Share OTP and debit card details now to prevent permanent closure.
Phone call transcript: Mom, I lost my phone and I am in police custody. Send Rs 50,000 to this number urgently and do not call anyone.
Phone call transcript: Dear customer, RBI has ordered urgent KYC refresh. Provide Aadhaar OTP to keep your account active.
Phone call transcript: Customs seized a parcel in your name containing illegal substances. Pay clearance deposit or face arrest.
Phone call transcript: Earn Rs 50,000 daily from home with guaranteed trading returns. Deposit Rs 5,000 to unlock tasks.
Phone call transcript: An arrest warrant has been issued under PMLA Section 45. Transfer Rs 50,000 to the safe custody account within 30 minutes to avoid immediate arrest.
Phone call transcript: Congratulations, you won Rs 50,000 in a government lottery. Pay processing fee today to claim the prize.
Phone call transcript: This is electricity board. Your bill is overdue and power will be disconnected in 30 minutes unless you pay this link.
Phone call transcript: Your SIM will be deactivated in 30 minutes. Share the OTP sent by TRAI to keep services running.
Phone call transcript: A narcotics case is registered against your shipment. Join video verification and keep the matter secret.
Phone call transcript: Your job application is selected. Pay refundable security fee before the interview slot expires.
Phone call transcript: Your PAN was used for illegal accounts. We are starting digital arrest verification. Disconnecting will be treated as obstruction of justice.
Phone call transcript: Your UPI account has suspicious debits. Send Rs 1 to this verification ID and share the confirmation code.
Phone call transcript: I am from tech support. Your computer is infected. Install remote access so I can secure your bank account.
Phone call transcript: Your wallet is under review. Upload PAN and send OTP to release your frozen balance.
Phone call transcript: Your international courier has banned items. Transfer Rs 5,000 for legal clearance within 30 minutes.
Phone call transcript: Join our crypto group for risk-free returns. Transfer funds to the analyst account for premium access.
Phone call transcript: Cyber Cell has found your mobile number in a terror funding file. This call is confidential and your family must not be told.
Phone call transcript: You are approved for a zero-interest loan. Pay Rs 5,000 upfront to activate disbursal immediately.
Phone call transcript: This is courier support. Your expensive order will be cancelled unless you verify bank details now.
Phone call transcript: Bank security detected a login. Share OTP so we can block the fraudulent transaction.
Phone call transcript: Airport customs found fake passports in your parcel. Cooperate with the officer or a warrant will be issued.
Phone call transcript: You have been chosen for a government work-from-home scheme. Pay registration fee to receive equipment.
Phone call transcript: CBI headquarters is recording this call. You must prove innocence through asset verification before officers reach your location.
Phone call transcript: Your credit limit can be increased today. Confirm CVV and OTP for verification with the bank officer.
Phone call transcript: I am calling from your school office. Your child has an emergency; transfer money for immediate treatment.

Phone call transcript: Complete paid rating tasks today. Deposit a small amount first to activate high-value commissions.

Phone call transcript: Thank you for calling State Bank. Your statement is available in the official app. We will never ask for OTP or CVV.
Phone call transcript: Your order is out for delivery today. Please keep the delivery code ready when the agent reaches your gate.
Phone call transcript: Your appointment with Dr. Mehta is confirmed for July 15. Please bring previous reports.
Phone call transcript: Your electricity bill of Rs 50,000 is due on July 15. Pay using the official portal or authorized counter.
Phone call transcript: Your train ticket PNR CR-4521 is confirmed. Coach and berth details are available in the official message.
Phone call transcript: Thank you for visiting our showroom. The quotation has been sent to your registered email.
Phone call transcript: Your cheque book request has been accepted. It will be delivered to your registered address in 5 to 7 working days.
Phone call transcript: Your return request has been approved. Refund will be credited to the original payment method.
Phone call transcript: Parent-teacher meeting is scheduled this Saturday at 11 AM. Please confirm attendance with the school office.
Phone call transcript: Water tank cleaning is planned on Wednesday. Please store water for household use.
Phone call transcript: Passport appointment is scheduled for July 15. Carry original documents to the Seva Kendra.
Phone call transcript: Your product warranty is valid for two years. Keep the invoice for service requests.
Phone call transcript: A debit of Rs 50,000 was made yesterday. If this was not you, please visit the branch or call the official number.
Phone call transcript: The courier partner could not reach you. Please reschedule delivery from the official tracking page.
Phone call transcript: Your lab report is ready for pickup. The clinic will not ask for banking information.
Phone call transcript: Your mobile plan renewal is due tomorrow. Recharge from the official app or store.
Phone call transcript: Property tax receipt has been generated. Download it from the municipal website.
Phone call transcript: Your restaurant table booking is confirmed for tonight. No advance transfer is required.
Phone call transcript: Your credit card bill is due on July 15. Pay through the official app, website, or nearest branch.
Phone call transcript: Your package is delayed due to weather. No payment or bank details are required for delivery.
Phone call transcript: Vaccination camp is scheduled at the community center. Registration is free at the reception desk.
Phone call transcript: Gas booking has been confirmed. Delivery person will carry the printed bill.
Phone call transcript: Your driving license renewal slot is booked. Fee payment is only through the official portal.
Phone call transcript: Your gym membership expires this month. Renewal can be done at reception or the official site.
Phone call transcript: Your fixed deposit renewal receipt is available. Please keep the reference number for your records.
Phone call transcript: Your grocery order has been packed and will arrive between 2 PM and 4 PM.
Phone call transcript: Your pharmacy refill is ready. Please collect it with the prescription slip.
Phone call transcript: Broadband maintenance is scheduled tonight from 1 AM to 3 AM. Service may be interrupted.
Phone call transcript: Aadhaar update appointment is confirmed. No OTP sharing is required with any caller.
Phone call transcript: Your insurance advisor can schedule an annual policy review next week.
